channel.title: Fremont Sunday Market
channel.description: Upcoming events for Fremont Sunday Market

item.title: Fremont Sunday Market
item.description:
Sunday, April 5, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: 3401 Evanston Ave N, Seattle

Year-round outdoor Sunday market in Fremont with 150+ vendors including vintage goods, crafts, food, and local farm produce.

Event details
